title: Gooey Jamaican Pepper Toast
description: A midnight craving dish that combines the flavors of Jamaica with the comfort of toast. Perfect for a quick and easy snack.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Roast the red bell pepper in the oven for 30-40 minutes, or until the skin is charred and blistered.
Remove the pepper from the oven and let it cool. Peel off the skin and dice the flesh.
In a pan, melt the butter over medium heat. Add the diced ginger and cook for 1 minute, or until fragrant.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, or until fragrant.
Add the diced scotch bonnet peppers and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until softened.
Add the cooked red bell pepper and stir to combine.
Add the ground allspice, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Butter the slices of bread and place them on a baking sheet.
Spoon the pepper mixture onto the bread.
Bake in the oven for 2-3 minutes, or until the bread is toasted and the filling is hot and gooey.
